creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194117
py-django-pyscss-reassign-to-django111.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that assigns www/py-django-pyscss to Django 1.11.

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS to Django 1.11 instead of Django 1.8
- sorted variables a bit

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
